subtitle.text: The hottest thing in the Cataclysm chain. That is not a compliment.

description: Ignis is one of the dual bosses after the Revenant stage.
Alongside the Annihilator, they form the second-to-last Cataclysm tier.
Cursium Ingots (from Maledictus) are required to access the Ignis fight.
You collected them in Ch09. Use them now.
Ignis drops Ignitium — a critical material for:
- The Magical Eye recipe (cataclysm:lacrima + cursium + ignitium required)
Ignitium also appears in the portal. Every boss you kill
moves an eye component closer to finished.
